_comment: Per-phenotype configuration for Step 8 functional evidence scoring.

_sources.opentargets: Open Targets Platform gene-disease association scores [0,1]. EFO/MONDO/HP ontology IDs.
_sources.gtex: GTEx v10 median TPM in phenotype-relevant tissues. Use tissueSiteDetailId from GTEx portal.
_sources.depmap: DepMap CRISPR Chronos essentiality scores (cancer/dna_repair phenotypes only).

_scoring_weights: OT=0.5, GTEx=0.3, DepMap=0.2. Missing sources have their weight redistributed.
_fallback: Any phenotype not listed falls back to cancer_resistance config.

cancer_resistance._description: Genes convergently evolved in species with extremely low cancer rates.

gtex._notes: Immune and epithelial tissues where cancer commonly originates

depmap._notes: Cancer cell line essentiality is directly relevant for cancer resistance targets

longevity._description: Genes associated with extended lifespan in long-lived species.

gtex._notes: Tissues most affected by aging: liver (metabolism), heart, brain, adipose, muscle

depmap._notes: Cancer cell lines not directly relevant for longevity phenotype

viral_immunity._description: Genes evolved in bat species that host high viral loads without disease.

opentargets._notes: viral infectious disease (EFO_0005140), COVID-19 (EFO_0007187), infectious disease (MONDO_0005550)

gtex._notes: Innate immune tissues and primary infection sites for respiratory/systemic viruses

hypoxia_tolerance._description: Genes evolved in species that tolerate extreme low-oxygen environments.

gtex._notes: Tissues with highest oxygen demand: cardiac muscle, skeletal muscle, brain

dna_repair._description: Genes involved in convergent improvements to DNA damage detection and repair.

gtex._notes: Rapidly dividing tissues with high DNA replication demand

depmap._notes: DNA repair genes often show synthetic lethality in cancer cell lines
